details.test: Task 1: 30-day inpatient alcohol, private room, < $15k, request info
Task 2: Choose evening-sessions program and book consultation
Task 3: Insurance verification for cheapest 60-day residential
Task 4: Register for Wednesday evening family support group
Task 5: Online assessment and request call for ~30-day inpatient
Task 6: Create reading list of 3 benzo withdrawal articles
Task 7: Find residential with gym access and start pre-admission
Task 8: Find 24/7 helpline and submit alcohol+anxiety callback
Task 9: Compare centers on family-friendliness and start admission
